tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $109.03/bbl confirmed (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3, +8.3% on Trump 'Stone Ages' escalation reversal). WTI ~$111/bbl (OilPriceAPI Apr 3). Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan); Iran hit UAE with 457 missiles + 2,038 drones Apr 2 (11 dead, 191 injured); simultaneous strikes on Israel, Saudi, Qatar, Kuwait. Philippines bilateral toll-free deal (Bloomberg Apr 2) does not reopen commercial P&I. April 6 deadline 3 days away; tail risk 50%. Stress target $105-135/bbl; tail $160-185/bbl on Kharg seizure + Saudi output cuts. PTTEP and Medco cleanest ASEAN equity beta. Reduce conviction only on confirmed ceasefire and commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $109.03 confirmed (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3, +8.3%); iTraxx Asia IG est. ~188bp (+10bp). Trump Apr 1 'leaving' was a head-fake - Apr 2 'Stone Ages' rhetoric confirms escalation not imminent withdrawal. ASEAN Energy Equities +6.8% on day (crude correlation); ASEAN Banks -2.9% on spread widening. Iran UAE attack (457 missiles, 11 dead) raises Saudi output-cut risk. Tail risk at 50% validates energy long / bank underweight positioning. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP 59.23 confirmed (Yahoo Finance Apr 2, -1.5% PHP strengthening). Philippines bilateral toll-free Hormuz deal (Bloomberg Apr 2) drove tactical PHP rally - but Brent $109.03 (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3) still ~$39/bbl above import cost assumption; JKM ~$20.13/MMBtu. Iran hit UAE with 457 missiles + 2,038 drones (11 dead) Apr 2. Tehran Toll Booth active; no Ras Laffan restart path; April 6 deadline 3 days away; tail risk 50%. PHP rally creates re-entry level for short; stress target 61.00-62.00 intact; bilateral deal does not resolve fundamental structural imbalance.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR 16,757 confirmed (Yahoo Finance Apr 2, IDR strengthened from 16,970 on bilateral-deal tailwinds). Tactical IDR strength is an entry opportunity - Brent $109.03 (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3) still $39.03/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 7.10% (+15bp). Iran hit UAE with 457 missiles + 2,038 drones (11 dead) Apr 2; Trump 'Stone Ages' Apr 2. Indonesia not confirmed on Iran 'friendly nations' list. April 6 deadline 3 days away; tail risk 50%; stress target 17,200-17,800; tail target 18,000+. Tehran Toll Booth active; subsidy deficit structural. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Apr 6
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~188bp (+10bp Apr 3); ASEAN HY est. ~555bp (+20bp). Apr 1 spread tightening was the tactical signal to hold; Apr 2 Trump 'Stone Ages' + Iran UAE attack (457 missiles, 11 dead) fully vindicated. Tehran Toll Booth P&I restoration structurally impossible; tail risk now 50%. IRGC cyberattack threat on 18 US tech firms still live (deadline passed Apr 1); new incident risk vector. 200-215bp becomes the April 6 event-risk target; Saudi output-cut risk from UAE attack adds systemic upside. Hold CDS protection through April 6.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Apr 6 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$20.13/MMBtu (+6.0% Apr 3, Investing.com); TTF €49.97/MWh (-3.9%, oilpriceapi Apr 2 confirmed). JKM-TTF spread widening: Asia bears the physical LNG shortage while European gas benefits from demand-side softness. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel) still constrains Hormuz LNG flows; Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked. Trump 'Stone Ages' (Axios Apr 2) + UAE massive attack reinforce LNG supply disruption; Brent $109.03 (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3). JKM upside target $24-28/MMBtu on April 6 Kharg escalation; stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart and commercial Hormuz reopening.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~188bp; ASEAN HY est. ~555bp - Apr 2 spread widening on Trump 'Stone Ages' + UAE attack (457 missiles, 11 dead) reconfirms market closure. April 6 deadline 3 days away; tail risk 50%. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - do not wait for April 6 outcome.

PTTEP: THB window closed again - TH 10Y est. 2.20% (+10bp Apr 3); USD/THB est. 33.35 (Apr 3, +2.5% reversal of Apr 1 THB rally). Brent $109.03 (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3) boosts upstream EBITDA by $39.03/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$20.13/MMBtu. Trump 'Stone Ages' escalation + UAE attack reopen April 6 binary. Execute H2 2026 prefunding via USD market now - THB opportunity closed; Gulf JV toll compliance review is urgent.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $109.03 (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3) and JKM ~$20.13 structurally elevated; USD/SGD est. 1.295 (risk-off Apr 3). iTraxx Asia IG widened to est. ~188bp on Trump 'Stone Ages' + UAE attack - Apr 1 tightening window closed. April 6 deadline 3 days away; tail risk 50%; any further escalation will close this window entirely. Execute revolving credit expansion and USD hedge before April 6.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 8%, stress 42%, tail 50%; Brent $109.03 (Gulf News/CNBC Apr 3); ASEAN HY est. ~555bp. JKM ~$20.13 sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Iran hit UAE with 457 ballistic missiles + 2,038 drones (11 dead) Apr 2 - GCC civilian infra attacks escalating; direct precedent for desalination/utility risk. Toll booth active; April 6 deadline 3 days away. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures before April 6 binary outcome.
